reasoning: Tech sector (XLK) is sharply outperforming at +1.13% vs SPY +0.45%, driving the morning's modest gains. However, breadth is narrow: financial sector (XLF) lags at -0.31%, signaling selective risk-on rotation into growth/tech only. Energy is flat at +0.18%. The divergence between XLK strength and XLF weakness suggests investors are betting on tech momentum rather than broad-based risk recovery. Bullish bias on SPY as long as tech outperformance holds, but financial weakness is a fragility signal — if XLK reverses, SPY loses its primary support.
key_observations: XLK: +1.13% — strong tech leadership, largest SPY weighting (~30%)
XLF: -0.31% — financial weakness contradicts broad risk-on narrative
XLE: +0.18% — energy flat, no inflation signal
Breadth: narrow — tech outperforming SPY by 0.68pp, financial sector lagging suggests fragile risk-on
